message:
I am thinking...: I have already created the core files for the restaurant management application as per the scratchpad. The user's last message indicates that the initial batch of files (layout, page, globals, and auth route) were created successfully.

I need to continue with the remaining files to complete the application structure:
1. API routes: `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts`, `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`
2. Dashboard: `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`
3. Auth pages: `src/app/auth/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/register/page.tsx`
4. Components: `src/components/Navbar.tsx`, `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`, `src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx`, `src/components/OrderTable.tsx`
5. Middleware and env: `src/middleware.ts`, `.env.example`

I will proceed by creating these files in batches as planned in the scratchpad. I will start with the API routes and the dashboard page.
